title: GB's Mod
description: This mod will add some strong unique items and more fantasy mobs if you want to enchance your medieval/fantasy styled of your Minecraft worlds, you can even craft some weapons and even meet new hostile and friendly mobs on your journay!
body:
**GB's Mod a fantasy mod that I work on from time by time whenever I am able too.
it was first made for Minectaft Bedrock but now it's being made for NeoForge 1.21.1**

The mod currently includes a few mobs, aggresive and semi-passive

Semi-passive mobs are the ones that won't attack the player but they will fight back if they get attacked by the player.

BetterCombat:
**It's not needed but recommended for making the weapons look cool with custom animations that better combat provides**
